title: centaurea attica subsp. ossaea
intro: Centaurea attica subsp. ossaea, also known as Mountain Cornflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea attica subsp. ossaea include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
